title: Belle comme la femme d'un autre
original_title: Belle comme la femme d'un autre
overview: Clémence is pathologically jealous. Gabriel has asked her to marry him. To test whether he is faithful, unbeknownst to him she arranges that he crosses paths with beautiful Olivia...
